info.title: Chameleon-i API
info.description: Chameleon-i is one of the most flexible recruitment database solutions on the market today. API endpoints are rooted at https://chiapi.chameleoni.com/

get.description:
This endpoint is used for
1- List the superset of  field/type that Chameleon-i can accept , including normal fields and custom fields. 

2- List the superset of  all drop down lists
Example :
“country”, "title" , "visatype" , "noticeperiod" , "travel" , "transportation" , "note_types", etc...

post.description: This endpoint is used to create new candidate in Chameleon-i database

title.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "title"

country.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "country"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files" if type is "attachment" or the candidate cv if type is "cv"

startdate.description: Note start date . format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

notetypeid.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "note_types"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

get.description: This endpoint is used to read candidate from Chameleon-i database

post.description: This endpoint is used to update an existing candidate in Chameleon-i database

title.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "title"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files" if type is "attachment" or the candidate cv if type is "cv"

startdate.description: Note start date . format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

notetypeid.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "note_types"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

tagid.description: The tag id , superset of tags (id & description) can be found in "lookups" under name "tag_tree"

assign.description: only 2 values are accepted , 0 & 1 , 0 means remove tag from entity , 1 means add tag to entity

get.description:
This endpoint is used for
1- List the superset of field/type that Chameleon-i can accept when adding or updating a company, including normal fields and custom fields. 
2- List the superset of all drop down lists
Example :
“industry”, "status" , etc...
This endpoint is used to read company from Chameleon-i database

This endpoint is used for
1- List the superset of field/type that Chameleon-i can accept when adding or updating a client, including normal fields and custom fields. 
2- List the superset of all drop down lists
Example :
“title”, "priority" , "note_types" , etc...
This endpoint is used to read client from Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to read requirement from Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to read contract from Chameleon-i database

post.description: This endpoint is used to create new company in Chameleon-i database

email.description: Company email address . if supplied must be a valid email address

industry.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "industry"

status.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "status"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

post.description: This endpoint is used to create new client in Chameleon-i database

email.description: Email . if supplied must be a valid email address

title.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "title"

priority.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "priority"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files"

startdate.description: Note start date . format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

notetypeid.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "note_types"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

post.description: This endpoint is used to update an existing company in Chameleon-i database

email.description: Company email address . if supplied must be a valid email address

industry.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "industry"

status.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "status"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

tagid.description: The tag id , superset of tags (id & description) can be found in "lookups" under name "tag_tree"

assign.description: only 2 values are accepted , 0 & 1 , 0 means remove tag from entity , 1 means add tag to entity

email.description: Email . if supplied must be a valid email address

title.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "title"

priority.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "priority"

filename.description: the name of file that will appear under entity "Attached files"

startdate.description: Note start date . format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

notetypeid.description: Accepted values can be found in "lookups" field "note_types"

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

tagid.description: The tag id , superset of tags (id & description) can be found in "lookups" under name "tag_tree"

assign.description: only 2 values are accepted , 0 & 1 , 0 means remove tag from entity , 1 means add tag to entity

lastupdated_from.description: Last updated from date , optional parameter but if supplied , "lastupdated_to" should be supplied too

lastupdated_to.description: Last updated to date , optional parameter but if supplied , "lastupdated_from" should be supplied too

searchid.description: Optional Parameter - Enter the ID of a Chameleon-I search to use its criteria. SearchID can be found under lookups / saved_search

viewid.description: Optional Parameter - Enter the ViewID which can be found under lookups / custom_views

basketid.description: Optional Parameter - Enter the BasketID which can be found under Basket / List , if supplied the search will go against content of this basket ID only

get.description: This endpoint is used for   1- List the superset of field/type that Chameleon-i can accept when adding or updating a requirement, including normal fields and custom fields.   2- List the superset of all drop down listsExample :“jobtype”, "sector" , "subector" , etc...

post.description: This endpoint is used to create new requirement in Chameleon-i database

userid.description: Accepted values can be found in users/list , field : userid

jobtype.description: Accepted values can be found in /requirement/lookup (jobtype)

sector.description: Accepted values can be found in /requirement/lookup (sector)

subsector.description: Accepted values can be found in /requirement/lookup (subsector)

post.description: This endpoint is used to update an existing requirement in Chameleon-i database

tagid.description: The tag id , superset of tags (id & description) can be found in "lookups" under name "tag_tree"

assign.description: only 2 values are accepted , 0 & 1 , 0 means remove tag from entity , 1 means add tag to entity

useridlist.description: comma separated userids , which can be found under users/list

teamidcsv.description: comma separated teamids , which can be found under users/list

tasktypeids.description: comma separated task type id , which can be found under candidate/lookups note_types

date_range.description: Search by activity 'Start Date' or activity 'Created Date' , if not supplied will search by activity 'Start Date'.

contacttype.description: get Candidate Activities or Client activities or all

notetodo.description: get Notes or Todos or all

userid.description: If supplied , it will be the owner of the basket . list of users can be found under users/list

post.description: Add or remove entities from basket

basketid.description: BasketID , all baskets can be retrieved through end point /basket/list

post.description: Search in Chameleon-i database for activities of certain types

from.description: Activity Creation time (from) , format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

to.description: Activity Creation time (to) , format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

post.description: Retrieve all deleted entities (activities/candidates/clients/...) within a period

from.description: Activity Creation time (from) , format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

to.description: Activity Creation time (to) , format DD-MMM-YYYY HH:mm:ss

get.description: This endpoint is used to delete an existing candidate in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to delete an existing company in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to delete an existing client in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to delete an existing requirement in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to delete an existing contract in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to delete an existing activity in Chameleon-i database
This endpoint is used to read candidate basic profile (CV , email , Name , location) from Chameleon-i database

post.description: Create a note or todo connected to multiple entities (candidates/clients/requirements/...)

notetypeid.description: Note Type ID which can be found under candidate/lookups , client/lookups note_types

useridlist.description: User IDs , comma separated . list of users can be found under users/list

create_alarm.description: Create an alarm , "no" : don't create alarm , "yes" : create alarm

post.description: This endpoint is used to update an existing requirement in Chameleon-i database

addremove.description: Add candidate(s) to shortlist or remove candidate(s) from shortlist

post.description: Retrieves entities information based on a phone number lookup
This endpoint is used to get all connected entities to an activity
